'''Eloggi''' was the second [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Endor system/Legends|Endor system]], on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It was a [[Water/Legends|frozen]], barren rock that possessed no [[Moon/Legends|moons]]. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] established a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] colony on the planet. In the wake of the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] allowed a number of [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustans]] to take over the operations there.

{{Planet-stub}}
